results.title: Event of Default
results._source_text_exact: 6.2 Upon an Event of Default, Lender may declare all outstanding principal and accrued interest immediately due and payable and may exercise all rights and remedies available under the Security Agreement and applicable law, including foreclosure on the Collateral.
results.original_text: 6.2 Upon an Event of Default, Lender may declare all outstanding principal and accrued interest immediately due and payable and may exercise all rights and remedies available under the Security Agreement and applicable law, including foreclosure on the Collateral.
results.reasoning_evidence: 6.2 Upon an Event of Default, Lender may declare all outstanding principal and accrued interest immediately due and payable and may exercise all rights and reme
results.quoted_text: Upon an Event of Default, Lender may declare all outstanding principal and accrued interest immediately due and payable and may exercise all rights and remedies available under the Security Agreement and applicable law, including foreclosure on the Collateral.
results.explanation_simple: The clause allows the Lender to demand immediate payment and take possession of the Collateral upon default.
results.why_it_matters: This clause creates significant financial exposure for the Borrower, as it enables the Lender to accelerate repayment and potentially seize assets.
results.legal_insight: This clause addresses a specific lending obligation, credit condition, or lender right.
results.market_comparison: This clause is common in loan agreements, but the potential for immediate acceleration and foreclosure can be seen as aggressive depending on the context.
results.red_flag_reason: The clause grants the Lender unilateral rights to accelerate payment and foreclose on Collateral, which poses a significant risk to the Borrower.
results.recommendation: Manual review required: generated text did not pass source-fidelity validation.
results.safer_alternative: The Lender may declare all outstanding principal and accrued interest immediately due and payable only upon specific, clearly defined Events of Default.

results.title: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
results._source_text_exact: 7.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware. Any dispute arising under this Agreement shall be resolved in the state or federal courts located in Wilmington, Delaware, and each Party irrevocably waives any right to a jury trial.
results.original_text: 7.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware. Any dispute arising under this Agreement shall be resolved in the state or federal courts located in Wilmington, Delaware, and each Party irrevocably waives any right to a jury trial.
results.reasoning_evidence: 7.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware. Any dispute arising under this Agreement shall be resolved in the state or federal co
results.quoted_text: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware. Any dispute arising under this Agreement shall be resolved in the state or federal courts located in Wilmington, Delaware, and each Party irrevocably waives any right to a jury trial.
results.explanation_simple: The clause specifies the governing law and jurisdiction for disputes.
results.why_it_matters: This clause limits the venue for legal disputes to Wilmington, Delaware, which may affect the convenience and costs for the parties involved.
results.legal_insight: This clause identifies the legal system or forum that will govern disputes under the contract.
results.market_comparison: This clause is common in contracts, particularly for those governed by Delaware law.
results.red_flag_reason: The waiver of the right to a jury trial could create an imbalance in dispute resolution preferences.
results.recommendation: Confirm that the chosen law and forum are practical, accessible, and consistent with the parties' location and transaction.
results.safer_alternative: Each Party retains the right to a jury trial for any disputes arising under this Agreement.

results.title: Event of Default
results._source_text_exact: 6.1 An Event of Default shall occur if Borrower fails to make any payment when due and such failure continues for ten (10) business days, breaches any covenant in Section 3 and fails to cure within thirty (30) days of notice, or becomes subject to insolvency proceedings.
results.original_text: 6.1 An Event of Default shall occur if Borrower fails to make any payment when due and such failure continues for ten (10) business days, breaches any covenant in Section 3 and fails to cure within thirty (30) days of notice, or becomes subject to insolvency proceedings.
results.reasoning_evidence: 6.1 An Event of Default shall occur if Borrower fails to make any payment when due and such failure continues for ten (10) business days, breaches any covenant
results.quoted_text: An Event of Default shall occur if Borrower fails to make any payment when due and such failure continues for ten (10) business days, breaches any covenant in Section 3 and fails to cure within thirty (30) days of notice, or becomes subject to insolvency proceedings.
results.explanation_simple: The clause outlines conditions under which an Event of Default occurs for the Borrower.
results.why_it_matters: Understanding the conditions of default is crucial for assessing potential financial and operational risks.
results.legal_insight: The clause specifies multiple triggers for default, including payment failure, covenant breaches, and insolvency. This creates a scenario where the Borrower could face significant consequences if any of these events occur, potentially leading to acceleration of debt or other remedies by the lender.
results.market_comparison: The conditions for default are relatively standard in loan agreements, but the specific timeframes for cure periods may vary.
results.recommendation: The clause clearly defines the conditions for an Event of Default, which is reasonable for protecting the lender's interests.
results.negotiation_advice: Consider defining notice methods, required addresses, deemed receipt, electronic delivery, language requirements, emergency notices, and change-of-address procedures.

source_evidence.label: TERMINATION_CURE_PERIOD
source_evidence.text: cure within thirty (30) days of notice, or becomes subject to insolvency proceedings

source_evidence.label: TERMINATION_CURE_PERIOD

section_path: 6. EVENTS OF DEFAULT AND ACCELERATION

6.1 An Event of Default shall occur if Borrower fails to make any payment when due and such failure continues for ten (10) business days, breaches any covenant in Section 3 and fails to cure within thirty (30) days of notice, or becomes subject to insolvency proceedings.

results.title: Security Interest
results._source_text_exact: 2.1 As security for Borrower's obligations under this Agreement, Borrower grants Lender a first-priority security interest in the Collateral, and shall execute all documents reasonably necessary to perfect such security interest, including UCC financing statements.
results.original_text: 2.1 As security for Borrower's obligations under this Agreement, Borrower grants Lender a first-priority security interest in the Collateral, and shall execute all documents reasonably necessary to perfect such security interest, including UCC financing statements.
results.reasoning_evidence: 2.1 As security for Borrower's obligations under this Agreement, Borrower grants Lender a first-priority security interest in the Collateral, and shall execute
results.quoted_text: 2.1 As security for Borrower's obligations under this Agreement, Borrower grants Lender a first-priority security interest in the Collateral, and shall execute all documents reasonably necessary to perfect such security interest, including UCC financing statements.
results.explanation_simple: The clause establishes a first-priority security interest for the Lender over the Collateral provided by the Borrower.
results.why_it_matters: This clause is significant as it gives the Lender a superior claim over the Collateral in case of Borrower's default, which could impact the Borrower's financial flexibility.
results.legal_insight: This clause may affect repayment obligations, interest exposure, security rights, guarantees, default consequences, or lender remedies.
results.market_comparison: This clause is common in secured lending agreements, where lenders seek to protect their interests by obtaining a priority claim on collateral.
results.recommendation: Check repayment timing, interest, security, guarantees, default triggers, acceleration rights, and enforcement mechanics.

7.1 This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware. Any dispute arising under this Agreement shall be resolved in the state or federal courts located in Wilmington, Delaware, and each Party irrevocably waives any right to a jury trial.
risk_reasons: Dispute resolution provisions determine how disagreements are resolved.

clauses.title: Security Interest
clauses._source_text_exact: 2.1 As security for Borrower's obligations under this Agreement, Borrower grants Lender a first-priority security interest in the Collateral, and shall execute all documents reasonably necessary to perfect such security interest, including UCC financing statements.

clauses.quoted_text: 2.1 As security for Borrower's obligations under this Agreement, Borrower grants Lender a first-priority security interest in the Collateral, and shall execute all documents reasonably necessary to perfect such security interest, including UCC financing statements.
clauses.explanation_simple: The clause establishes a first-priority security interest for the Lender over the Collateral provided by the Borrower.

clauses.legal_insight: This clause may affect repayment obligations, interest exposure, security rights, guarantees, default consequences, or lender remedies.
clauses.market_comparison: This clause is common in secured lending agreements, where lenders seek to protect their interests by obtaining a priority claim on collateral.

section_path: 2. SECURITY INTEREST

clauses.title: Prepayment of Loan

section_path: 1. LOAN TERMS

1.1 Lender shall disburse the principal amount of the Loan to Borrower upon satisfaction of the conditions precedent set forth in Exhibit A. The Loan shall bear interest at a fixed rate of 8.25% per annum, payable monthly, with principal amortized over the term of the Loan.

clauses.title: Event of Default
clauses._source_text_exact: 6.2 Upon an Event of Default, Lender may declare all outstanding principal and accrued interest immediately due and payable and may exercise all rights and remedies available under the Security Agreement and applicable law, including foreclosure on the Collateral.

clauses.quoted_text: Upon an Event of Default, Lender may declare all outstanding principal and accrued interest immediately due and payable and may exercise all rights and remedies available under the Security Agreement and applicable law, including foreclosure on the Collateral.
clauses.explanation_simple: The clause allows the Lender to demand immediate payment and take possession of the Collateral upon default.
clauses.why_it_matters: This clause creates significant financial exposure for the Borrower, as it enables the Lender to accelerate repayment and potentially seize assets.
clauses.legal_insight: This clause addresses a specific lending obligation, credit condition, or lender right.
clauses.market_comparison: This clause is common in loan agreements, but the potential for immediate acceleration and foreclosure can be seen as aggressive depending on the context.
clauses.red_flag_reason: The clause grants the Lender unilateral rights to accelerate payment and foreclose on Collateral, which poses a significant risk to the Borrower.

section_path: 3. REPRESENTATIONS AND COVENANTS

3.1 Borrower represents that it is duly organized, in good standing, and has the authority to enter into this Agreement. Borrower covenants to maintain a debt-service coverage ratio of not less than 1.25:1, tested quarterly, and to provide Lender with quarterly financial statements within forty-five (45) days of each fiscal quarter end.

clauses.title: Prepayment of Loan
clauses._source_text_exact: 4.1 Borrower may prepay the Loan, in whole or in part, at any time without penalty, provided that any partial prepayment shall be applied first to accrued interest and then to outstanding principal.

section_path: 4. PREPAYMENT
4.1 Borrower may prepay the Loan, in whole or in part, at any time without penalty, provided that any partial prepayment shall be applied first to accrued interest and then to outstanding principal.

clauses.title: Loan Disbursement and Interest
clauses._source_text_exact: 1.1 Lender shall disburse the principal amount of the Loan to Borrower upon satisfaction of the conditions precedent set forth in Exhibit A. The Loan shall bear interest at a fixed rate of 8.25% per annum, payable monthly, with principal amortized over the term of the Loan.

section_path: 1. LOAN TERMS

1.1 Lender shall disburse the principal amount of the Loan to Borrower upon satisfaction of the conditions precedent set forth in Exhibit A. The Loan shall bear interest at a fixed rate of 8.25% per annum, payable monthly, with principal amortized over the term of the Loan.
